title: Build a Counter Component
prompt: Build a `Counter` component that displays a count and has three buttons: **Increment**, **Decrement**, and **Reset**. The count should never go below 0.
context: React state (`useState`) lets a component remember values between renders. Each call to the state setter triggers a re-render with the new value. Event handlers (onClick) are the standard way to trigger state changes in response to user interaction.
